syntax_14510.creator: maicon_jh
syntax_14510.title: Validate YAML File
syntax_14510.description: Validates a YAML file against a JSON schema. Errors are stored in the 'last schema validation errors' expression. Use 'if size of {_errors::*} is 0' to check if validation passed.

en: Validates a YAML file against a JSON schema. Errors are stored in the 'last schema validation errors' expression. Use 'if size of {_errors::*} is 0' to check if validation passed.

syntax_14511.creator: maicon_jh
syntax_14511.title: Validate JSON File
syntax_14511.description: Validates a JSON file against a JSON schema. The first string is the path to the JSON data file, and the second string is the path to the JSON schema file. Validation errors are stored in the 'last schema validation errors' expression. Use 'if size of {_errors::*} is 0' to check if validation passed.

en: Validates a JSON file against a JSON schema. The first string is the path to the JSON data file, and the second string is the path to the JSON schema file. Validation errors are stored in the 'last schema validation errors' expression. Use 'if size of {_errors::*} is 0' to check if validation passed.

syntax_14512.creator: maicon_jh
syntax_14512.title: Last Schema Validation Errors
syntax_14512.description: Returns a list of validation error messages from the last schema validation (JSON or YAML). Returns empty list if validation passed. Use 'set {_errors::} to last schema validation errors' to get the errors, then check 'if size of {_errors::} is 0' to determine if validation succeeded.

en: Returns a list of validation error messages from the last schema validation (JSON or YAML). Returns empty list if validation passed. Use 'set {_errors::} to last schema validation errors' to get the errors, then check 'if size of {_errors::} is 0' to determine if validation succeeded.
